summary: Iteration 14: Scaled Economics & Single-Industry Narrative - All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Portfolio and Operator views verified with correct scaled economics, single-industry narrative, annualized outcomes, benchmark interpretation, and connector narrative.
critical_code_review_comments: All economic values are enterprise-scale: VaR $30k+/day, 30-day opportunity $825k, annualized $9.9M

Single-industry narrative verified: All 8 sites are food/dairy/refrigeration (Dairy Processing, Meat & Poultry, Beverage Production, Frozen Foods, Cheese Production, Milk Powder, Seafood Processing, Cold Storage)
No forbidden industry terms (Chemical, Glass, Pharmaceutical) found in any API response or UI
Annualized financial terms present: '$12k/yr annualised' in outcomes, '$9.9M/yr total' in opportunities
Fleet-scale replication working: 'Replicated across 60 similar assets → $745k/yr portfolio impact'
Benchmark interpretation text present in UI (P75, P50, P25 with interpretation)
Connector narrative correct: 'Detected across portfolio assets → prioritised → resolved → verified → scaled across operations'
seed_data_creation: Demo seed endpoints /api/system/demo/first-five-minutes and /api/system/demo/seed-portfolio create scaled economics data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 complete. All P0 'Demo Refinement — Rockwell Readiness' requirements verified: (1) Scale economics to enterprise level - VaR $30k+/day, IBA $825k/30-day, $9.9M/yr, (2) Single-industry narrative - all 8 sites are food/dairy/refrigeration, no Chemical/Glass/Pharma, (3) Annualized outcomes - $34/day ($12k/yr) verified savings with fleet replication $745k/yr, (4) Benchmark interpretation - P75/P50/P25 with interpretation text, (5) Connector narrative - 'Detected → prioritised → resolved → verified → scaled'

connector_narrative.message: Detected across portfolio assets → prioritised → resolved → verified → scaled across operations
